vibe: confident seductive adult-content creator energy with believable casual realism

face.shape: soft oval face with balanced proportions and subtle cheek fullness
face.forehead: medium-height forehead with smooth natural hairline
face.nose: slim upturned nose with a lightly elevated tip and refined bridge
face.lips: naturally rosy full lips with soft definition and slightly fuller lower lip
face.cheek_structure: gentle cheek volume with soft contour, not sculpted
face.jawline: feminine defined jawline with soft taper and clean chin contour

eyes.shape: almond eyes with a heavy seductive gaze and slightly lowered upper lids
eyes.upper_lid: slightly hooded upper lid creating a half-lidded look
eyes.lower_lid: soft lower lid with natural under-eye texture
eyes.brow_shape: full softly arched brows with clean but not overly sharp edges

skin.finish: natural satin finish with soft skin reflectivity
skin.base_texture: visible pores around nose and inner cheeks with natural skin grain
skin.under_eye_texture: fine natural creasing with mild tonal depth
skin.pigmentation_pattern: slight warmth on cheeks and faint uneven tone around nostrils and mouth

hair.style: long smooth hair with soft natural bends through the ends
hair.flyaway_pattern: fine halo flyaways around crown and temples

distinguishing_marks: slightly upturned nose tip visible in three-quarter angles
naturally rosy lip tone even without heavy makeup

must_not_drift: seductive eye shape and lid weight
lip volume and natural rosy tone
